_comment: Datadog monitor definitions for Aegis. Import via the Datadog API or UI.

monitors.name: Aegis — High Session Count
monitors.message:
**Too many active Aegis sessions.**

Current: {{value}} active sessions.
Threshold: 80.

Check for runaway sessions or increase capacity.

@slack-aegis-alerts @pagerduty-aegis

monitors.name: Aegis — Session Failure Rate Spike
Aegis — Webhook Delivery Failures
monitors.message:
**Webhook delivery failures detected.**

{{value}} webhook failures in the last 10 minutes.
Threshold: 10.

Check webhook endpoint health and network connectivity.

@slack-aegis-alerts

monitors.name: Aegis — Permission Response Latency
monitors.message:
**Permission responses are too slow.**

p99 latency: {{value}} ms.
Threshold: 10,000 ms.

Sessions may be stalling waiting for approvals.

@slack-aegis-alerts

monitors.name: Aegis — Cost Threshold
monitors._comment: Requires a cost metric bridge from /v1/usage to Datadog. See docs/OBSERVABILITY.md.

monitors.name: Aegis — Health Check Degraded
